transcript: Speaker A: माझ्या मॅनेजरला माहित नाही की मी गेल्या दोन महिन्यांपासून English practice करत आहे आणि तिला वाटतं माझं English पुरेस चांगलं नाही. आज मी तिला surprise देणार आहे. [My manager doesn't know that I have been practicing English for the last two months, and she thinks my English isn't good enough. Today, I am going to surprise her.] Speaker A: I completely understand. I'm so sorry for the inconvenience. I'll have that sorted for you right away. Speaker B: Wow हे खूप professional English होतं. हे कुठून शिकलीस? [Wow, that was very professional English. Where did you learn this from?] Speaker A: मी गेल्या दोन महिन्यांपासून रोज फोनवर MySivi वर practice करत होते. जसं तुमच्या खिशातच एक English teacher असतो तसं. हे बघा, मी तुम्हाला दाखवते. [I have been practicing on MySivi on my phone every day for the last two months. Just like having an English teacher in your pocket. Look, let me show you.] Speaker C: तुझं नाव काय आहे? [What is your name?] Speaker A: I name is Shruti. Speaker C: "I name is Shruti" नाही, "My name is Shruti". [Not "I name is Shruti", "My name is Shruti".] Speaker C: तू कुठे राहतेस? [Where do you live?] Speaker A: I am Mumbai. Speaker C: "I am Mumbai" नाही, "I live in Mumbai". [Not "I am Mumbai", "I live in Mumbai".] Speaker A: मी नेहमी इथेच गोंधळ करते. [I always get confused here.] Speaker C: आणि म्हणूनच मी इथे आहे, तुला योग्य English बोलायला मदत करायला. [And that's why I am here, to help you speak correct English.] Speaker A: पण हे महाग असेल ना? [But this must be expensive, right?] Speaker C: अजिबात नाही. Normal English classes पेक्षा ७ पट स्वस्त आहे. म्हणून १ कोटी लोक MySivi वर English practice करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker A: पण वेळ मिळत नाही. [But I don't get time.] Speaker C: रोज फक्त १०-१५ मिनिटांची practice पुरेशी आहे. अगदी confident व्हाल. [Just 10-15 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will become very confident.] Speaker A: Wow, कसं join करू? [Wow, how do I join?] Speaker C: हा install चा button दाबा आणि MySivi app install करा. Sign up करा आणि practice start करा. फक्त १५ दिवसात तुम्हाला improvement दिसायला लागेल. चला, सुरू करा. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, let's start.]

summary: A hotel trainee surprises her manager with fluent English learned via the MySivi app. She demonstrates how the app's AI avatar corrects her grammar in real-time. The ad highlights that the app is 7x cheaper than traditional classes and requires only 10-15 minutes of daily practice.
